repos.rationale: Single repository in scope. The bug is in src/update/perform.ts line 124 (execSync tar call). Fix creates src/update/extract.ts (in-process tar extraction using node:zlib + manual tar parsing), modifies perform.ts to call it, and adds src/update/extract.test.ts. No new dependencies — built-in modules only, since the release tarball has no node_modules/. No cross-repo impact.
